project.name: Salt 2.0
project.description: A Progressive Web App built on Firebase with a strict hexagonal (ports-and-adapters) architecture for a family grocery/shopping app

nodes.name: no-firebase
nodes.summary: Deliberate boundary-test violation fixture: imports 'firebase/firestore' from within the domain layer to verify ESLint's no-restricted-imports rule rejects it.

nodes.name: no-web-pwa
nodes.summary: Deliberate boundary-test violation fixture: imports '@salt/web-pwa' to verify the boundaries/element-types ESLint rule prohibits importing the app package.

nodes.name: no-domain
nodes.summary: Deliberate boundary-test violation fixture: imports '@salt/domain' from the shared-types layer to verify the boundaries rule that shared-types must not import domain.

nodes.name: circular-a
nodes.summary: Deliberate circular-dependency fixture (half A): imports from b.ts and exports a constant, used with b.ts to verify dependency-cruiser's no-circular rule fires.

nodes.name: circular-b
nodes.summary: Deliberate circular-dependency fixture (half B): imports from a.ts and exports a constant, completing the cycle used to verify dependency-cruiser's no-circular rule.

nodes.name: run.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that runs all boundary-enforcement tests by invoking ESLint and dependency-cruiser against deliberate violation fixtures and asserting each produces an error. Reports pass/fail counts and exits non-zero if any check fails.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md (project-local)
nodes.summary: Project-local AI agent instructions mandating use of the vexp pipeline for all cross-package code-relationship tasks, with workflow steps and tool reference for the vexp MCP server.

nodes.name: commands README
nodes.summary: Index of all Claude Code slash commands (design, issue, phase-start, phase-end, arch-update, stuck) with usage table and the full Opus→Sonnet implementation workflow diagram.

nodes.name: arch-update command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for updating architecture documentation after a feature is fully implemented, instructing the AI to review and propose targeted doc updates.

nodes.name: design command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for kicking off a new feature design session, guiding the AI to ask clarifying questions, identify risks, and agree on a design before producing any implementation.

nodes.name: issue command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for writing a structured GitHub issue with context, architecture references, constraints, phased implementation plan, and definition of done.

nodes.name: phase-end command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for closing out an implementation phase: posts a handoff GitHub comment, optionally posts a flags comment, commits changes following conventional commit rules, and surfaces personal flags.

nodes.name: phase-start command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for opening a new implementation phase: reads the GitHub issue and previous handoff comment, confirms scope, then implements with strict out-of-scope guardrails.

nodes.name: stuck command
nodes.summary: Slash command prompt template for mid-phase surprises: reads the issue, assesses whether the problem is architectural or implementation-level, and recommends a surgical response.

nodes.name: vexp-guard.sh
nodes.summary: Claude Code PreToolUse hook that blocks Grep/Glob tools when the vexp daemon is running and healthy, forcing agents to use the vexp pipeline for codebase exploration.

nodes.name: Claude Code settings (shared)
nodes.summary: Shared Claude Code settings file defining allowed Bash commands, MCP tool permissions, and additional directory access for all contributors on this project.

nodes.name: Claude Code settings (local)
nodes.summary: Local (gitignored-pattern) Claude Code settings with an extensive allow-list of Bash and WebFetch permissions accumulated from prior development sessions on this machine.

nodes.name: .dependency-cruiser.cjs
nodes.summary: dependency-cruiser configuration that codifies Salt's hexagonal architecture import rules: no-circular, domain-no-firebase, adapter isolation, no-import-web-pwa, and cross-runtime ld-observability subpath guards.

nodes.name: .firebaserc
nodes.summary: Firebase project alias file mapping the default alias to the 'demo-salt' emulator project ID.

nodes.name: copilot-instructions.md
nodes.summary: GitHub Copilot agent instructions mandating use of the vexp run_pipeline tool for all code-relationship tasks and agentic searches in this repository.

nodes.name: CI workflow
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI pipeline running lint, typecheck, unit tests, boundary tests, provenance check, and theme check on every push/PR to main, plus separate jobs for Vitest emulator integration tests and Playwright E2E tests (sequenced to avoid concurrent emulator stacks).

nodes.name: Claude Assistant workflow
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs Claude Code (Opus model) on-demand when the repo owner mentions '@claude' in an issue comment or PR review comment.

nodes.name: Nightly Doc Review workflow
nodes.summary: Nightly GitHub Actions workflow (2 AM UTC) that runs Claude Code to detect stale documentation after recent commits, automatically updating simple cases (Verdict A) or filing issues for ambiguous drift (Verdict B).

nodes.name: .gitignore
nodes.summary: Root gitignore excluding node_modules, build artifacts, Firebase emulator data, environment files, test reports, and the vexp manifest.

nodes.name: commit-msg hook
nodes.summary: Husky commit-msg git hook that runs commitlint to enforce conventional commit message format on every local commit.

nodes.name: pre-commit
nodes.summary: Husky pre-commit hook that runs lint-staged, TypeScript type checking, and dependency-cruiser boundary checks before each commit.

nodes.name: .nvmrc
nodes.summary: Node Version Manager configuration specifying Node.js version 22 for the project.

nodes.name: .prettierrc
nodes.summary: Prettier code formatting configuration with Svelte plugin support, 2-space indent, single quotes, and 100-char print width.

nodes.name: .vexpignore
nodes.summary: vexp code indexing ignore rules excluding generated artifacts, build outputs, Firebase emulator data, environment files, and lock files from the index.

nodes.name: launch.json
nodes.summary: VS Code launch configurations for the Task Pilot extension, Microsoft Edge debugging (standard and headless), and DevTools attachment for local development at localhost:5173.

nodes.name: mcp.json
nodes.summary: VS Code MCP server configuration wiring the vexp code-intelligence MCP server via stdio for the Salt V2 workspace.

nodes.name: settings.json
nodes.summary: VS Code workspace settings enabling pnpm auto-approve for chat tools and persistent integrated terminal sessions.

nodes.name: tasks.json
nodes.summary: VS Code task definitions for launching Firebase Emulators, Vite Dev Server, and Genkit Admin UI as background tasks with appropriate problem matchers.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative machine-enforced architecture contract for Salt 2.0 defining the hexagonal layer map, hard import rules, Zod schema conventions, and enforcement mechanisms for AI agents and CI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README for Salt 2.0 describing it as a Firebase PWA with hexagonal architecture and listing the key getting-started commands.

nodes.name: appmap.yml
nodes.summary: AppMap configuration for the salt project specifying JavaScript language and project-wide coverage excluding node_modules and .yarn.

nodes.name: .secret.local
nodes.summary: Local secret environment file for Cloud Functions emulator containing actual Gemini API key and LaunchDarkly SDK key (gitignored).

nodes.name: .secret.local.sample
nodes.summary: Sample template for the Cloud Functions local secret file showing the required GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable with a placeholder value.

nodes.name: package.json (cloud-functions)
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @salt/cloud-functions defining esbuild bundling for Node 22 ESM, Genkit dev server, and dependencies on firebase-admin, firebase-functions, genkit, and workspace packages.

nodes.name: no-ld-observability.ts
nodes.summary: Boundary test fixture asserting that Cloud Functions must not import the default @salt/ld-observability subpath (browser-only LaunchDarkly SDK), which ESLint's no-restricted-imports rule should flag.

nodes.name: no-stage-internals.ts
nodes.summary: Boundary test fixture verifying that Cloud Functions cannot directly call internal canon-matching stage functions (tokenMatch, stringSimilarity, synonymMatch, embedMatch) from @salt/domain, which ESLint should flag.

nodes.name: firestoreAisleStore.ts
nodes.summary: Firestore adapter implementing AisleLocalStorePort for Cloud Functions, reading the aisles document from the canonData collection with Zod validation and returning Failure on corruption.

nodes.name: firestoreCanonStore.ts
nodes.summary: Firestore adapter implementing CanonLocalStorePort for Cloud Functions with full CRUD (upsert, load, list, delete) on the canonItems collection, skipping invalid docs on list reads.

nodes.name: serverArbitration.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side adapter implementing CanonArbitrationPort by delegating to the arbitrateCanon Genkit flow, mapping domain ArbitrationRequest to flow input and wrapping the result in success/failure.

nodes.name: serverEmbedding.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side adapter implementing EmbeddingPort by delegating to the embedText Genkit flow, plus an inline cosine similarity computation for the domain matching pipeline.

nodes.name: serverEntryParse.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side adapter implementing EntryParsePort by delegating to the parseEntry Genkit flow and constructing a ParsedEntry with optional amount/unit fields absent (not undefined) for exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance.

nodes.name: serverMatchLog.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side adapter implementing MatchLoggingPort by writing structured canon.match log entries via firebase-functions logger using summarizeMatchLog from the domain.

nodes.name: dev.ts
nodes.summary: Development entry point for the Genkit dev server that registers the embedText and arbitrateCanon flows for the Genkit Admin UI.

nodes.name: arbitrateCanon.ts
nodes.summary: Genkit flow that uses Gemini to arbitrate canon matching — deciding whether a normalised input matches an existing canon item or needs a new one, with aisle assignment and shopping behavior classification.

nodes.name: embedText.ts
nodes.summary: Genkit flow wrapping the Gemini embedding-001 model to compute text embeddings for use in the canon semantic matching pipeline.

nodes.name: identifyEquipment
nodes.summary: Genkit AI flow that takes a raw equipment name and uses Gemini to produce 1–4 canonical UK English candidate equipment names with rationale. Validates input/output via domain schemas.

nodes.name: matchOrCreateCanon
nodes.summary: Core Genkit AI flow for canon item matching. Wires Firestore adapters, LaunchDarkly observability, embedding, and arbitration ports into the domain matchOrCreate function. Handles W3C trace context stripping and span lifecycle.

nodes.name: parseEntry
nodes.summary: Genkit AI flow that parses a raw shopping-list text entry into structured fields: name, context (for-phrase), optional amount (number) and optional unit (string). Uses Gemini at temperature 0.

nodes.name: populateEquipmentEntry
nodes.summary: Genkit AI flow that takes a confirmed kitchen equipment name and produces a canonical UK English name plus a list of first-party accessories with included/excluded status.

nodes.name: genkit
nodes.summary: Shared Genkit AI instance for cloud-functions. Disables Genkit's own OTel initialisation and root-span detection so the LaunchDarkly OTel provider can own the global tracer provider.

nodes.name: genkitTracing
nodes.summary: Registers a BatchSpanProcessor that forwards Genkit-tagged OTel spans to the local Genkit Dev UI (GENKIT_TELEMETRY_SERVER). Bridges the LD OTel provider and the Genkit dev-trace routing.

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: Cloud Functions entry point. Exports all callable functions (embedText, arbitrateCanon, matchOrCreateCanon, identifyEquipment, populateEquipmentEntry) and Firestore triggers (onShoppingListItemWrite, onCanonItemWritten). Initialises Firebase Admin, LD observability, and Genkit dev-tracing at module load.

nodes.name: onShoppingListItemWrite
nodes.summary: Firestore trigger that fires on shopping list item writes. Parses raw text (deterministic then AI fallback for compound entries), calls matchOrCreate, and writes back canonId, matchState, amount, and unit to the item document. Instruments with LD observability spans.

nodes.name: arbitrateCanon.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the arbitrateCanon Genkit flow. Covers result mapping (match/new/no-match), aisle resolution, rawResponse handling, prompt construction, and shoppingBehavior/largeQuantityThreshold/unit passthrough.

nodes.name: embedText.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the embedText Genkit flow. Verifies the flow returns embedding values and passes text content to the embedder unchanged.

nodes.name: identifyEquipment.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the identifyEquipment Genkit flow. Covers result mapping, candidate count handling, prompt construction, and UK English system instructions.

nodes.name: matchOrCreateCanon.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for matchOrCreateCanon flow. Uses an in-memory Firestore mock to test direct match, AI arbitration, forceCreate, selectedAisleId, and ValidationError paths.

nodes.name: matchOrCreateCanon.tracePropagation.test
nodes.summary: Tests for _trace field stripping and OTel span lifecycle in the matchOrCreateCanon flow. Verifies the W3C trace context is not leaked into persisted CanonItems and that spans are always closed.

nodes.name: parseEntry.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the parseEntry flow and createServerEntryParseAdapter. Covers for-phrase splitting, casing, amount/unit extraction, prompt construction, and adapter error paths.

nodes.name: populateEquipmentEntry.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the populateEquipmentEntry Genkit flow. Covers accessory result mapping, included/excluded flags, canonical name correction, and prompt construction.

nodes.name: smoke.test
nodes.summary: Smoke test asserting that @salt/shared-types and @salt/domain can be imported from cloud-functions, verifying the allowed layer import graph.

nodes.name: onShoppingListItemWrite.emulator.test
nodes.summary: Emulator integration tests for onShoppingListItemWrite trigger. Uses real Firestore Admin SDK against the Dockerised Vitest emulator stack to verify matched/needs_approval/failed state writes and notes-only-edit skip behaviour.

nodes.name: onShoppingListItemWrite.test
nodes.summary: Comprehensive unit tests for onShoppingListItemWrite trigger. Covers skip conditions, matching outcomes, entry parsing (deterministic + AI fallback), amount/unit write-through, observability span lifecycle, and logger output.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for cloud-functions. Extends base config, sets NodeNext module resolution, declares composite project references to shared-types, domain, firebase-sync, and ld-observability.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache for cloud-functions. Auto-generated by the TypeScript compiler; not hand-edited.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for cloud-functions unit tests. Includes all test files except emulator tests, runs in Node environment.

nodes.name: vitest.emulator.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for emulator integration tests. Targets only *.emulator.test.ts files, injects the Vitest-stack Firestore emulator port (8082), and forces single-fork pool for serialised emulator access.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Entry HTML for the kitchen-sink Vite app. Loads the Epilogue and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the Svelte app via /src/main.ts.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the @salt/kitchen-sink UI component showcase app. Depends on @salt/ui-components and Svelte 5; uses Vite with the Svelte plugin on port 5174.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration for the kitchen-sink app. Enables Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins.

nodes.name: App.svelte
nodes.summary: Root Svelte component for the kitchen-sink demo app. Provides a sticky top navigation bar with dark-mode toggle, a sidebar nav, and renders all section demo components (Colors, Typography, Layout, Button, Form, Combobox, Overlay, Feedback, Templates).

nodes.name: app.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS entrypoint for the kitchen-sink app. Imports tokens.css, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities layers, and defines base element resets (focus ring, input/button styles).

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the kitchen-sink Vite app. Imports global CSS and mounts the root App Svelte component onto the #app DOM element.

nodes.name: ButtonSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section showcasing the Button and Icon components from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates all variants (solid, outline, ghost, link, destructive), sizes, states (disabled, loading, fullWidth), and icon usage (leading/trailing).

nodes.name: ColorsSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for the Salt color system. Displays semantic palette swatches (CSS custom properties), brand color swatches (Midnight Navy, Sage Green, Terracotta, etc.), and role pairing contrast demos.

nodes.name: ComboboxSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for the Combobox component from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates a standard searchable select and an allow-custom-values variant with onCreate callback.

nodes.name: FeedbackSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for feedback components from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates Progress (with range slider control), Spinner (multiple sizes), Icon grid (lucide-svelte icons), and Toast (standard + destructive).

nodes.name: FormSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for form input components from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates TextField, TextArea, Checkbox, Switch, RadioGroup, Select, and Slider with all states and variants.

nodes.name: LayoutSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for layout primitives from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates Stack, Grid, Inline, Divider, Card (with header/content/footer), and Text components.

nodes.name: OverlaySection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for overlay components from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates Dialog (sm/md/lg sizes), Sheet (all four sides), Popover, and Tooltip (all four positions).

nodes.name: TemplatesSection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for high-level page template components from @salt/ui-components. Demonstrates ListPage (with state machine for data/loading/empty/error), FormPage (with async submit), DetailPage, SelectableList (with bulk actions), EmptyState, and ErrorState.

nodes.name: TypographySection.svelte
nodes.summary: Kitchen-sink demo section for the Salt typography scale. Displays named text styles: display, h1, h2, body-lg, body-md, and label-caps with font specs annotated.

nodes.name: tokens.css
nodes.summary: Design token CSS custom properties for the kitchen-sink app. Defines semantic color aliases (--color-*) that resolve to --salt-* primitives, supports light/dark themes via .dark class, and mirrors Tailwind preset tokens for use in non-utility CSS contexts.

nodes.name: svelte.config.js
nodes.summary: Minimal Svelte configuration for the kitchen-sink app. Registers vitePreprocess as the sole preprocessor.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration for the kitchen-sink app. Extends the @salt/ui-components tailwind preset and specifies content paths covering kitchen-sink sources and ui-components package.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for the kitchen-sink app. Extends the monorepo base tsconfig, sets up composite project with ES2022+DOM lib, and references the ui-components package.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the kitchen-sink app. Minimal config registering only the @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte plugin.

nodes.name: .env.development
nodes.summary: Development environment variables for the web-pwa app. Contains Firebase project configuration and emulator connection settings for local development.

nodes.name: .env.production
nodes.summary: Production environment variables for the web-pwa app. Contains Firebase project configuration for the live production Firebase project.

nodes.name: .env.staging
nodes.summary: Staging environment variables for the web-pwa app. Contains Firebase project configuration for the staging Firebase project.

nodes.name: index.d.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated SvelteKit output type declaration file. Re-exports the SvelteKit build output types.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Auto-generated SvelteKit output JavaScript entry file. The compiled build output index for the web-pwa SvelteKit app.

nodes.name: aisles-seed.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright e2e test verifying that the seedAisles helper correctly writes aisles to Firestore and that they render on the /canon/aisles route. Uses e2e auth fixtures and seed helpers.

nodes.name: auth.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright e2e smoke test verifying that the devSignIn flow correctly signs a user in and that the app shell renders the user email and sign-out button.

nodes.name: canon-sync.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright e2e two-tab convergence tests for manifest-driven canon sync. Tests that canon items and aisles seeded in one browser context propagate to a second context via the Firestore manifest subscription tick. Also tests offline drain/propagation after reconnection.

nodes.name: equipment-capture.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests for the equipment capture and edit lifecycle: full capture flow (raw name → confirm → accessories → save), list seeding via __e2e bridge, delete via bulk-select UI, and persistence across reload. Tests run against Firestore + Auth emulators; AI callables degrade gracefully when GEMINI_API_KEY is absent.

nodes.name: test.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright base-test extension adding three auto-use fixtures: clearFirestore (wipes emulator before each test), observabilitySession (injects LaunchDarkly session meta and captures LD session URL as attachment), and coverageData (collects V8 JS coverage and writes raw JSON to coverage/e2e-raw).

nodes.name: globalSetup.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright global setup: builds cloud-functions bundle, starts the Docker-composed test emulator stack (docker-compose.test.yml) via `docker compose up --wait`, wipes Firestore + Auth emulator data, and starts or reuses the Vite dev server on port 5174 wired to test-emulator ports. Manages WSL2 free-port blackhole workarounds (issue #79, #84).

nodes.name: globalTeardown.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright global teardown: conditionally (CI or E2E_TEARDOWN=1) kills the host-spawned Vite e2e server via fuser and brings down the Docker test-emulator stack with `docker compose down -v`. Leaves stack running for local dev speed; reaps cleanly in CI.

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: E2E auth helper utilities: uniqueEmail generates a deterministic per-test email, signIn uses the __e2e bridge to call devSignIn after the bridge is ready, and gotoAndSignIn combines navigation + sign-in in one call.

nodes.name: dnd.ts
nodes.summary: E2E drag-and-drop helper for keyboard-based reordering via svelte-dnd-action: focuses a draggable <li>, presses Space to enter drag mode, sends ArrowUp/ArrowDown N times, then Space to drop. Avoids pointer-based drag which is unreliable under headless Chromium.

nodes.name: locators.ts
nodes.summary: Typed Playwright locator factories for reuse across specs: aislesPage (add, bulk-delete, row/checkbox/drag-handle locators), canonCreatePage (combobox, pending indicator), and canonDetailPage (name edit, synonyms, aisle select, delete dialog).

nodes.name: seed.ts
nodes.summary: E2E Firestore seed helpers that delegate to the __e2e bridge: seedAisles, seedCanonItem, getAisles, getCanonItem, and clearAllStores. Used by specs to pre-populate data without going through the UI.

nodes.name: issue-12-aisles.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E spec for issue #12: adding aisles in bulk, keyboard-reordering via svelte-dnd-action, bulk-deleting an aisle, and verifying that referencing canon items have their aisleId nulled and needs_approval set to true.

nodes.name: issue-16-canon-create-detail.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E spec for issue #16: canon create/detail page flows — creating new items via combobox, picking existing items, matching by normalised name, renaming, editing synonyms, changing aisle, and deleting items with navigation back to canon list.

nodes.name: ldSessionReporter.ts
nodes.summary: Custom Playwright reporter that prints a LaunchDarkly session replay URL to stdout for failed (non-skipped) tests. Reads the 'ld-session' attachment written by the observabilitySession fixture.

nodes.name: shopping-list-happy-path.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E spec for shopping list core lifecycle: list creation on first visit, item capture, check/uncheck, clear-checked, persistence across reload, item edit sheet (raw text + notes), and collapse/expand of grouped items. Exercises the onShoppingListItemWrite CF trigger path where available.

nodes.name: shopping-list-multi-list.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E spec for multi-list shopping: creating a second list, navigating between lists, verifying the default list delete button is disabled, bulk-moving items between lists, and verifying activeListId survives page reload via URL.

nodes.name: smoke.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal smoke test: navigates to app root and asserts the sign-in screen renders (email label, magic link button, heading).

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: SPA entry point HTML for the Salt web-pwa. Minimal shell with a #app mount point and a module script tag loading src/main.ts.

nodes.name: package.json (web-pwa)
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @salt/web-pwa. Declares workspace dependencies on all salt packages, SvelteKit/Svelte 5, svelte-spa-router, and lucide-svelte. Dev dependencies include Playwright, Vitest, Testing Library, Istanbul/V8 coverage tools, and Tailwind. Scripts for dev, build, e2e, and coverage.

nodes.name: playwright-report/index.html
nodes.summary: Generated Playwright HTML test report artifact. This is an auto-generated output file produced by `playwright test --reporter=html`; not a source file.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright configuration for the web-pwa e2e suite. Single Chromium project, workers:1, globalSetup/globalTeardown pointing to e2e/, base URL http://127.0.0.1:5174. Registers ldSessionReporter alongside html/list/github reporters. Explicitly omits webServer block due to WSL2 free-port blackhole (issue #79).

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for the web-pwa build.

nodes.name: process-e2e-coverage.ts
nodes.summary: Node script that converts raw V8 JSON coverage files (written by the coverageData fixture) into Istanbul-format HTML and LCOV reports. Reads coverage/e2e-raw/*.json, converts via v8-to-istanbul, merges with istanbul-lib-coverage, and writes HTML + LCOV to coverage/e2e.

nodes.name: App.svelte
nodes.summary: Root Svelte 5 application component. Wraps the app in AuthGate and ToastProvider, renders an AppShell with reactive nav items (canon badge for needs_approval count), initialises Firestore subscriptions for canon/equipment/shopping-list on auth, and conditionally renders the dev SessionOverlay.

nodes.name: no-firebase-sync-internal.ts
nodes.summary: Architecture boundary violation fixture: deliberately imports @salt/firebase-sync internal subpath to assert that ESLint no-restricted-imports rule catches direct internal imports (only the package root is allowed from web-pwa).

nodes.name: no-ld-observability-server.ts
nodes.summary: Architecture boundary violation fixture: deliberately imports the @salt/ld-observability/server subpath from web-pwa to confirm the ESLint rule blocks the cross-runtime import (server subpath is Node-only, for cloud-functions).

nodes.name: no-stage-internals.ts
nodes.summary: Architecture boundary violation fixture: deliberately imports canon matching stage functions (tokenMatch, stringSimilarity, synonymMatch, embedMatch) directly from @salt/domain to assert web-pwa must only use the public findClosestMatch / matchOrCreate pipeline surface.

nodes.name: app.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS entry point for the web-pwa. Injects Tailwind base, components, and utilities layers.

nodes.name: AuthGate
nodes.summary: Svelte component that guards routes behind Firebase Auth. Shows a loading spinner while auth state resolves, then renders LoginPage if unauthenticated or the child slot if authenticated.

nodes.name: LoginPage
nodes.summary: Svelte login page component providing passwordless magic-link sign-in form. Also exposes a dev sign-in shortcut when running against emulators. Uses ui-components for layout.

nodes.name: env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declaration file for Vite/Svelte environment. Declares ImportMetaEnv with Firebase config and emulator flag variables. Also provides *.svelte module type.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal barrel/re-export file. Currently exports nothing (empty export).

nodes.name: aisleService
nodes.summary: Web-pwa service layer for aisle CRUD. Bridges domain commands (createAisle, renameAisle, reorderAisles, deleteAisles, mergeAisles) with firebase-sync persistence. Re-exports reactive stores from canonService.

nodes.name: auth.svelte.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte 5 rune-based auth store. Manages magic-link flow (send, complete from URL), session storage for pending email, dev sign-in helper via emulator oobCodes endpoint, and identifies users with observability.

nodes.name: canonService
nodes.summary: Core web-pwa service for canon items and aisles. Manages Svelte writable stores, Firestore subscriptions, in-memory store adapters, fast-path match against local canon, and CF escalation via callMatchOrCreate. Includes full set of canon item CRUD operations.

nodes.name: SessionOverlay
nodes.summary: Draggable developer overlay component for controlling LaunchDarkly observability sessions. Allows starting/stopping recordings and copying the session URL. Has no external imports (self-contained with $lib alias).

nodes.name: e2eHooks
nodes.summary: E2E test bridge installer. When VITE_USE_EMULATORS=true, attaches window.__e2e with helpers for devSignIn, seed/query aisles, canon items, equipment, shopping list, Firestore online/offline toggling, and observability session tagging.

nodes.name: equipmentService
nodes.summary: Web-pwa service layer for the equipment manifest. Manages Svelte stores, Firestore subscription, and all equipment/accessory/rule CRUD commands backed by domain pure functions. Includes AI capture helpers and E2E seed utilities.

nodes.name: firebase.ts
nodes.summary: Firebase initialisation entry point for the web-pwa. Reads VITE env vars, builds FirebaseOptions (with emulator stubs when VITE_USE_EMULATORS=true), calls initFirebase, and exports the authProvider and useEmulators flag.

nodes.name: nav.ts
nodes.summary: Static navigation item configuration for the PWA sidebar/bottom-nav. Defines the five top-level routes (Home, Shop, Items, Kitchen, Settings) using lucide-svelte icons and @salt/ui-components NavItem type.

nodes.name: observability.ts
nodes.summary: Thin facade over @salt/ld-observability for the web-pwa. Initialises LaunchDarkly with optional manual-start in dev, and re-exports identify/tag/session functions typed against domain User.

nodes.name: shoppingListService.svelte.ts
nodes.summary: Web-pwa service layer for shopping lists and items. Manages Svelte stores for lists, config, and active-list items with Firestore subscriptions. Implements full list/item CRUD using domain commands, plus batch operations and snapshots for E2E.

nodes.name: titleCase.ts
nodes.summary: Single utility function that converts a string to title case using lowercase + word-boundary regex replacement.

nodes.name: toastStore.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for toast notifications. Provides addToast and dismissToast helpers with id, message, and variant (default/destructive/success) shape.

nodes.name: e2e.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declarations for the E2E test bridge. Defines SeedCanonItemInput and E2EBridge interface, and augments the global Window type with __e2e and __e2eAutoTag properties.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Application entry point. Initialises observability, mounts the Svelte App component into #app, and installs E2E hooks.

nodes.name: NotFound
nodes.summary: 404 not-found route component. Renders an EmptyState with a Go home button using @salt/ui-components.

nodes.name: AisleManagementPage
nodes.summary: Full-featured aisle management page. Supports sortable list with inline rename, multi-select, bulk delete (with affected-item preview), and bulk merge with per-item move/unassign choice. Heavy use of ui-components dialogs and SortableList.

nodes.name: CanonCreatePage
nodes.summary: Canon item creation page. Combines a Combobox (search existing or type new) with an optional aisle selector. On create, calls the canon matching pipeline and navigates to the resulting item detail page.

nodes.name: CanonDetailPage
nodes.summary: Detail page for a single CanonItem. Handles inline name editing, aisle Combobox, synonyms, shopping behavior radio, quantity threshold, approval workflow, split-most-recent-synonym, and delete with confirmation dialog.

nodes.name: CanonListPage
nodes.summary: Canon item list page. Groups items by aisle, supports pending-at-top display mode, filter by name, multi-select with bulk approve and bulk delete. Uses CanonListRow as the row component.

nodes.name: CanonListRow
nodes.summary: Inline-editable list row component for a CanonItem. Wide layout shows aisle Combobox, shopping behavior Select, and numeric threshold+unit inputs with on-blur persistence. Narrow layout is a navigation button.

nodes.name: EquipmentCapturePage
nodes.summary: Three-step equipment capture wizard. Step 1: raw name entry. Step 2: pick from AI-identified candidates or type custom. Step 3: review AI-populated accessories, toggle ownership, add extras manually, then save.

nodes.name: EquipmentEditPage
nodes.summary: Detail/edit page for a single equipment item. Supports inline name editing, accessory management (add/remove/toggle-owned) and rule management (add/edit/remove), each with confirmation dialogs. Uses Svelte 5 runes and dispatches to equipmentService.

nodes.name: EquipmentListPage
nodes.summary: List page showing all equipment items ('Kitchen' title). Supports multi-select, select-all checkbox, and bulk delete with a confirmation dialog. Items are sorted alphabetically and navigate to their detail page on click.

nodes.name: HomePage
nodes.summary: Minimal home/dashboard page that displays a welcome header and a single card linking to the canonical item database. Has no reactive logic.

nodes.name: routes/index
nodes.summary: Central SPA route registry. Exports a Map of path patterns to Svelte page components using svelte-spa-router's RouteDefinition type. More-specific static routes precede parameterised ones.

nodes.name: SettingsPage
nodes.summary: Simple settings page that displays the currently signed-in user's email, read from the auth store. Uses FormPage with no submit action.

nodes.name: ShoppingListCreatePage
nodes.summary: Form page for creating a new shopping list. Captures a name, calls addList, shows a toast, and navigates to the new list on success.

nodes.name: ShoppingListManagePage
nodes.summary: Management settings page for a specific shopping list. Supports rename, set-as-default, and delete operations. Prevents deleting the current default list. Uses DetailPage layout.

nodes.name: ShoppingListPage
nodes.summary: Main shopping list view page. Displays items grouped by aisle using domain-layer groupItemsByAisle and combineItemsByUnit. Supports item add, inline check/uncheck, multi-select, bulk delete/check/move, and an edit sheet. Items in the same canon group with different units are shown in collapsible slot rows. Integrates canonService for aisle/canon context.

nodes.name: ShoppingListRedirectPage
nodes.summary: Redirect trampoline shown when navigating to /shopping. Reads the default list ID and pushes to the correct list page, or to /shopping/new if no default is set. Shows a spinner while loading.

nodes.name: svelte.config
nodes.summary: Minimal Svelte config that activates vitePreprocess for TypeScript/PostCSS in .svelte files.

nodes.name: tailwind.config
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS config for web-pwa. Extends the @salt/ui-components preset, sets content paths to include both app and ui-components sources, and enables dark mode via class strategy.

nodes.name: .last-run
nodes.summary: Playwright last-run result file recording overall test status and list of failed tests. Auto-generated artifact.

nodes.name: CanonCreatePage.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for CanonCreatePage Svelte component. Covers combobox filtering (name/synonym match), pending state, decision-branch navigation (created/matched/ai_arbitrated), selecting an existing item, and error state. Uses @testing-library/svelte and vi.mock for service mocks.

nodes.name: CanonDetailPage.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for CanonDetailPage Svelte component. Covers not-found state, pre-filling of name/synonyms fields, name editing (success and validation error), synonyms editing (with whitespace trimming), aisle selection, and delete flow (dialog, confirm, toast, navigation).

nodes.name: EquipmentCapturePage.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for EquipmentCapturePage multi-step capture flow. Verifies step-1 rendering, captureEquipmentItem call with accessories, navigation on success, disabled Save during loading, and error toast on failure.

nodes.name: EquipmentListPage.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for EquipmentListPage. Covers empty state, alphabetical sort, singular/plural accessory labelling, row click navigation, select-all/clear, and multi-select delete confirmation flow calling removeEquipmentItems.

nodes.name: canonService.sync.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for canonService subscription logic, in-memory adapters (memAisleStore, memCanonStore), snapshot helpers, and command functions (updateCanonItemName, updateCanonItemAisle, updateCanonItemSynonyms, deleteCanonItem). Mocks firebase-sync and ld-observability. Comprehensive coverage of store hydration ordering and cleanup.

nodes.name: equipmentService.sync.test
nodes.summary: Unit tests for equipmentService subscription lifecycle, hydration guard (mutations blocked before first snapshot), and all mutation operations (add/capture/rename/remove item, accessory and rule CRUD). Verifies saveEquipmentManifest call counts and memEquipmentManifestStore behaviour.

nodes.name: tests/setup
nodes.summary: Vitest global test setup file. Imports @testing-library/jest-dom matchers and extends Vitest expect with vitest-axe accessibility matchers.

nodes.name: smoke.test
nodes.summary: Smoke test that renders the root App Svelte component and asserts zero axe accessibility violations on mount.

nodes.name: tsconfig (web-pwa)
nodes.summary: TypeScript project config for web-pwa. Composite build targeting ES2022+DOM, with project references to shared-types, domain, firebase-sync, and ui-components packages.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache file (auto-generated binary artifact).

nodes.name: vite.config (web-pwa)
nodes.summary: Vite config for web-pwa. Registers the Svelte plugin, sets up the $lib path alias, and excludes @salt/* packages from dependency optimisation.

nodes.name: vitest.config (web-pwa)
nodes.summary: Vitest config for web-pwa. Injects Firebase env vars, uses jsdom environment, maps $lib alias, forces browser conditions for module resolution, and includes all tests under tests/**.

nodes.name: commitlint.config
nodes.summary: Root commitlint configuration extending the conventional commits preset to enforce standardised commit message format across the monorepo.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Firebase test-emulator runtime image for issue #84. Builds on node:22-bookworm-slim, installs Temurin 21 JRE (required by firebase-tools v15+ Firestore emulator), pins firebase-tools@^15.17.0, bakes in Firestore and UI emulator jars to avoid cold-start jar downloads, and starts auth+firestore+functions emulators against /repo/firebase.test.docker.json.

nodes.name: docker-compose.test.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose stack for e2e (Playwright) tests. Runs Firestore + Auth + Functions emulators in a healthcheck-gated container on distinct host ports (8081/9100/5002). Bind-mounts repo read-only, uses a named scratch volume, and exposes emulator hub on 4402. Used by globalSetup.ts via `docker compose up --wait`.

nodes.name: docker-compose.vitest.yml
nodes.summary: Isolated Docker Compose stack for Vitest emulator integration suites. Project name 'salt-vitest-emulators'. Runs Firestore + Auth only (no Functions) on distinct host ports 8082/9101. Reuses the same Dockerfile image. Overrides healthcheck to Firestore+Auth-only HTTP probes. Never runs concurrently with the e2e stack.

nodes.name: healthcheck.sh
nodes.summary: Container healthcheck for the Firebase test emulator stack. Reports healthy only when Firestore, Auth, and Functions triggers are all registered. Uses timer-bounded curl probes (--max-time 5) per the WSL2 free-port contract. Functions readiness check mirrors globalSetup.ts waitForFunctions via CORS OPTIONS preflight to matchOrCreateCanon.

nodes.name: Canon Matching — Logging & Observability
nodes.summary: Documents the MatchLogEntry schema, MatchLoggingPort interface, MatchLogBuilder usage pattern, and all three live adapters: browser LaunchDarkly adapter (fast-path), server LaunchDarkly adapter (CF), and firebase-functions/logger structured-log adapter. All adapters are fire-and-forget. Explains how to inspect logs via LD UI and Cloud Logs Explorer.

nodes.name: Promoting a Visual Fix to a Token
nodes.summary: Agent recipe for reactively promoting visual fixes into design tokens. Specifies the order of files to touch (design.md, tailwind-preset.ts, tokens/*.ts, tokens test, primitive component, kitchen-sink), verification commands, and a worked checkbox example. Enforces token-first workflow and prohibits speculative token additions.

nodes.name: Culinary Modernist Design System
nodes.summary: Design system source-of-truth YAML + prose. Defines 'Culinary Modernist' theme with color tokens (Slate Teal primary, Sage Green secondary), typography (Epilogue/Inter dual-font), spacing (4px unit), border-radius, control sizes (checkbox, switch). Prose covers brand style, layout, elevation, shapes, and key components (buttons, cards, inputs, kitchen-specific components).

nodes.name: UI Primitives Specification v0.2
nodes.summary: Authoritative specification for the @salt/ui-components primitive library v0.2. Defines architecture, naming, styling, testing conventions, and provenance headers. Covers core components: Button, TextField, Textarea, Checkbox, Switch, Dialog, Popover, Tooltip, Card, Heading, Text, Icon, Stack, Inline, Grid, Divider, Spinner, Progress.

nodes.name: UI Primitives Specification v0.3
nodes.summary: Planning-status spec extending v0.2 with advanced APG-based primitives: RadioGroup, Select, Slider, Sheet, Toast. Explicitly defers Combobox to v0.4. Each primitive follows a headless (state/ARIA/keyboard) + styled (Tailwind/CVA/tokens) split. All v0.2 global rules remain in force.

nodes.name: UI Primitives Specification v0.4
nodes.summary: Planning-status spec extending v0.3 with Combobox. Defines Combobox parts (Root, Input, Trigger, Content, Item, Group, Label, Separator, Empty, Create), APG Autocomplete Listbox pattern with ARIA roles (combobox/listbox/option), keyboard navigation, and custom-value support.

nodes.name: Domain Modules & Coordinators Pattern Guide
nodes.summary: v1.3 pattern guide for structuring domain modules in @salt/domain. Defines the entities/ports/commands/queries/index.ts structure, module isolation rules (no internal cross-module imports), coordinator pattern for cross-module workflows, and testing approach. Canon is the worked example.

nodes.name: E2E & Emulator Integration Tests
nodes.summary: Documents the containerized test emulator architecture (issue #84): two independent Docker Compose stacks (e2e Playwright stack with Firestore+Auth+Functions on ports 8081/9100/5002; Vitest integration stack with Firestore+Auth only on 8082/9101), port isolation table, emulator config (firebase.test.docker.json), dev server setup, and poisoned-environment troubleshooting.

nodes.name: Canon Item Matching Pipeline
nodes.summary: Documents the 6-stage canon matching pipeline: stages 1-4 (exact name, token overlap, synonym exact, string similarity) run deterministically on client fast-path and CF; stages 5-6 (embedding, merge) run server-side only. Defines two entry points (matchOrCreateCanon CF callable, onShoppingListItemWrite trigger), AI arbitration, and logging strategy.

nodes.name: Salt 2.0 Architecture Contract v1.0
nodes.summary: Authoritative prose architecture contract. Defines the hexagonal layer map (web-pwa, domain, firebase-sync, cloud-functions, ld-observability, ui-components, shared-types), allowed/forbidden import graph, Firestore-as-source-of-truth model, offline cache strategy, conflict resolution (LWW), and single-family workspace model.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: Root ESLint flat config enforcing the hexagonal architecture import graph via eslint-plugin-boundaries. Defines layer elements, forbidden imports (Firebase SDK outside firebase-sync, IndexedDB anywhere, app imports from packages), per-module domain cross-module subpath rules, coordinator rules, stage 1-5 internal access restriction, and ld-observability browser/server subpath isolation.

nodes.name: firestore_export.overall_export_metadata (export 1)
nodes.summary: Firestore export overall metadata file for the first export snapshot. Single-line binary/metadata descriptor for the Firestore data export bundle.

nodes.name: all_namespaces_all_kinds.export_metadata
nodes.summary: Firestore export per-kind metadata file for the second export snapshot. 4-line descriptor referencing the output-0 data file for all namespaces/all kinds.

nodes.name: output-0 (Firestore export data)
nodes.summary: Binary Firestore export data file containing all document snapshots from the second export. 1522 lines of serialized Firestore documents covering canonItems, shoppingLists, canonData, and other collections.

nodes.name: firestore_export.overall_export_metadata (export 2)
nodes.summary: Firestore export overall metadata file for the second export snapshot. 3-line descriptor for the full export bundle.

nodes.name: firebase.json
nodes.summary: Root Firebase project config for local development. Configures Cloud Functions source (apps/cloud-functions), Firestore rules/indexes, Storage rules, Hosting (apps/web-pwa/build), and emulator ports: auth 9099, functions 5001, firestore 8080, storage 9199, hosting 5000, UI 4000. Does not set host:0.0.0.0 — dev emulator only.

nodes.name: firebase.test.docker.json
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the containerized test emulator port set. Mirrors firebase.json structure but sets host:0.0.0.0 on all emulators so mapped container ports are reachable from the host. Ports: auth 9100, functions 5002, firestore 8081, hub 4402, UI 4002. Used by both docker-compose.test.yml and docker-compose.vitest.yml.

nodes.name: firestore.indexes.json
nodes.summary: Firestore composite index definitions. Currently empty (no custom indexes or field overrides defined).

nodes.name: firestore.rules
nodes.summary: Firestore security rules. Defines per-collection access: notes (public read, no write), canonItems (auth read+write), canonData (auth read+write), equipmentManifest (auth read+write), shoppingLists and subcollection items (auth read+write), shoppingListsConfig (auth read+write). Default deny-all fallback.

nodes.name: package.json (root)
nodes.summary: Root pnpm monorepo package.json. Defines workspace scripts (lint, typecheck, boundary:test, test, dev, dev:emulators, test:emulator), lint-staged config (prettier + eslint on commit), pnpm overrides (@opentelemetry/api pinned to 1.9.0, fast-xml-parser, firebase-admin uuid), and devDependencies (ESLint, TypeScript, Vitest, Husky, Prettier, firebase-tools, dependency-cruiser).

nodes.name: .env.test (firebase-sync)
nodes.summary: Environment variables for the @salt/firebase-sync Vitest emulator integration tests. Sets VITE_EMULATOR_FIRESTORE_PORT=8082 and VITE_EMULATOR_AUTH_PORT=9101 to target the isolated docker-compose.vitest.yml stack (not the dev emulator). Committed to the repo (not gitignored) so CI picks it up automatically.

nodes.name: firebase-sync package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @salt/firebase-sync. Declares dependencies on @salt/domain, @salt/shared-types, and firebase ^11.0.0. Exports the package root from src/index.ts. Defines test and test:emulator scripts.

nodes.name: no-indexeddb boundary test
nodes.summary: Deliberate boundary violation fixture asserting that importing 'idb' (IndexedDB) in firebase-sync is blocked by ESLint no-restricted-imports rule. Used by the boundary test suite to confirm the rule is active.

nodes.name: aisleSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for the aisles document. Provides subscribeAisles (realtime Firestore listener with Zod validation) and saveAisles (write). Validates with AislesDocumentSchema and maps Firestore errors via classifyFirestoreError.

nodes.name: auth
nodes.summary: Firebase Auth adapter implementing the AuthProvider domain port. Supports magic-link email sign-in, sign-out, auth state observation, and current user retrieval. Maps Firebase Auth error codes to DomainError. Exports connectAuthEmulatorOnce for emulator setup.

nodes.name: canonMatching
nodes.summary: Firebase Functions callable adapter for the matchOrCreateCanon Cloud Function. Accepts MatchOrCreateInput and returns a ReadResult. Piggybacks W3C trace context on the payload via _trace field for dormant trace propagation support.

nodes.name: canonSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for the canonItems collection. Provides subscribeCanonItems (realtime listener, skips invalid docs), upsertCanonItem, and deleteCanonItem. Validates each doc with CanonItemSchema.

nodes.name: equipmentCallables
nodes.summary: Firebase Functions callable adapters for equipment AI flows: callIdentifyEquipment and callPopulateEquipmentEntry. Both call Cloud Functions in europe-west2, map auth/network errors to DomainError, and return ReadResult.

nodes.name: equipmentManifestSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for the equipmentManifest singleton document. Provides subscribeEquipmentManifest (realtime listener with Zod validation) and saveEquipmentManifest (write). Maps Firestore errors via classifyFirestoreError.

nodes.name: firestoreErrors
nodes.summary: Utility that maps Firestore SDK error codes to DomainError values. Handles offline detection via navigator.onLine, classifies transient/auth/storage errors, and strips 'firestore/' prefixes. Used by all subscription adapters.

nodes.name: firebase-sync index
nodes.summary: Public barrel export for @salt/firebase-sync. Re-exports all Firebase adapter functions and types: auth, canon, aisles, equipment, shopping list items, shopping lists, config, and callable wrappers.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Firebase initialisation module. Exports initFirebase (initializes the Firebase app, optionally enables Firestore persistent cache and emulator connections) and setFirestoreNetwork (enable/disable Firestore network). Connects Firestore, Functions, and Auth emulators from env vars.

nodes.name: shoppingListItemSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for shopping list items subcollection. Provides realtime subscription, one-off list fetch, save, single delete, batch delete, and move-between-lists operations. Validates each doc with ShoppingListItemSchema; invalid docs are skipped in list reads.

nodes.name: shoppingListSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for the shoppingLists collection. Provides realtime subscription, one-off list fetch, create, rename, and delete operations on ShoppingList documents. Validates each doc with ShoppingListSchema.

nodes.name: shoppingListsConfigSubscription
nodes.summary: Firebase adapter for the shoppingListsConfig singleton document. Provides realtime subscription, one-off load, and save operations. Validates with ShoppingListsConfigSchema; returns null when the document does not yet exist.

nodes.name: emulatorHelpers
nodes.summary: Shared test utilities for emulator integration tests. Exports initFirebaseEmulator (initializes Firebase and signs in anonymously so Firestore security rules pass) and clearFirestoreEmulator (deletes all Firestore documents via the emulator REST API).

nodes.name: equipmentManifestSubscription.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for subscribeEquipmentManifest. Covers: non-existent document (null), valid document parsing, schema validation failure (StorageError corruption), and Firestore stream errors being classified correctly.

nodes.name: firestoreErrors.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for classifyFirestoreError. Covers offline detection via navigator.onLine, all classified error codes (unavailable, failed-precondition, deadline-exceeded, internal, aborted, permission-denied, unauthenticated, resource-exhausted, data-loss), firestore/ prefix stripping, and fallback cases.

nodes.name: realtimeSubscriptions.emulator.test
nodes.summary: Emulator integration tests for all realtime Firestore subscriptions: aisles, canon, equipment manifest, shopping list items, shopping lists, and config. Runs against the Firebase emulator. Tests round-trip writes and subscription callbacks with real Firestore behaviour.

nodes.name: shoppingListItemSubscription.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for shoppingListItemSubscription. Covers subscription callbacks for valid/invalid items, listShoppingListItems, saveShoppingListItem, deleteShoppingListItem, deleteShoppingListItems (batch), and moveShoppingListItems. Tests Zod validation filtering and error propagation.

nodes.name: shoppingListSubscription.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for shoppingListSubscription. Covers subscription callbacks, listShoppingLists, createShoppingList, renameShoppingList, and deleteShoppingList. Tests schema validation filtering and error propagation.

nodes.name: shoppingListsConfigSubscription.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for shoppingListsConfigSubscription. Covers subscription when document absent (null), valid document parse, schema validation failure, loadShoppingListsConfig, and saveShoppingListsConfig.

nodes.name: smoke.test
nodes.summary: Minimal smoke test verifying @salt/firebase-sync is importable and that its allowed dependency layers (@salt/domain, @salt/shared-types) can also be imported without errors.

nodes.name: firebase-sync tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for @salt/firebase-sync. Extends base tsconfig, sets rootDir/outDir, enables composite mode, and references packages/domain and packages/shared-types for project-references enforcement.

nodes.name: firebase-sync tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build info cache file generated by tsc --build. Machine-generated; not human-edited.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for @salt/firebase-sync. Includes tests/**/*.test.ts and excludes emulator tests (*.emulator.test.ts) so the default run uses unit tests only.

nodes.name: vitest.emulator.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for firebase-sync emulator tests. Configures single-fork sequential test execution to prevent concurrent Firestore access conflicts, targets emulator-specific test files, and documents the import.meta.env approach for retargeting Firebase client SDK to isolated emulator ports (issue #84 Phase 3).

nodes.name: package.json (@salt/ld-observability)
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the LaunchDarkly observability adapter. Declares dual subpath exports (default browser subpath and ./server Node subpath), LaunchDarkly SDK dependencies, OpenTelemetry dependencies, and workspace references to @salt/domain and @salt/shared-types.

nodes.name: index.ts (ld-observability browser)
nodes.summary: Public barrel export for the browser-side LaunchDarkly observability subpath. Re-exports all browser adapters: LD match logging adapter, error reporting adapter, init functions (initLDObservability, identifyObservabilityUser, identifyObservabilityAnonymous, trackObservabilityEvent, startSpan, extractTraceHeaders), session tagging, and session control.

nodes.name: init.ts (ld-observability browser)
nodes.summary: Browser-side LaunchDarkly observability initialization. Initialises a singleton LDClient with Observability and SessionReplay plugins, exposes user/anonymous identity functions, event tracking, manual OTel span creation (wrapping LDObserve.startManualSpan), and W3C traceparent extraction for propagating browser trace context to Cloud Functions.

nodes.name: ldErrorReportingAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Adapter implementing the domain ErrorReportingPort using LaunchDarkly Observability (LDObserve.recordError). Bridges domain error reporting port to LD's error capture API.

nodes.name: ldMatchLoggingAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Browser-side adapter implementing the domain MatchLoggingPort. Creates an OTel span per match log entry using LDObserve.startManualSpan, applies the canon.match wire schema attributes via the shared applyMatchLogAttrs helper, with optional parent span for trace linking.

nodes.name: index.ts (ld-observability server)
nodes.summary: Public barrel export for the Node.js server subpath of ld-observability. Re-exports server match logging adapter, server observability init/flush/status functions, span utilities (startSpan, extractTraceHeaders, runWithExtractedTraceContext), and the addServerSpanProcessor hook.

nodes.name: init.ts (ld-observability server)
nodes.summary: Node.js server-side OTel tracing initialization for Cloud Functions. Sets up NodeTracerProvider with OTLP exporter to LaunchDarkly's endpoint, HTTP and gRPC auto-instrumentations, ParentBasedSampler, W3C trace propagation helpers, runWithExtractedTraceContext for callable entrypoints, flush helper, and an addServerSpanProcessor hook for CF-local processors. Includes a NOOP span implementation for when observability is uninitialised.

nodes.name: serverMatchLoggingAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side counterpart to ldMatchLoggingAdapter. Implements domain MatchLoggingPort for Cloud Functions by creating OTel spans per match log entry using the server-side startSpan, applying the shared applyMatchLogAttrs wire schema. Keeps browser and CF span attributes in sync via the shared helper.

nodes.name: sessionControl.ts
nodes.summary: Session recording control functions for LaunchDarkly session replay. Provides startObservabilitySession (with optional name tagging), stopObservabilitySession, and isObservabilitySessionActive querying LDRecord.getRecordingState.

nodes.name: sessionTagging.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test session tagging for LaunchDarkly session replay. Defines ObservabilitySessionMeta interface and provides tagObservabilitySession (attaches test metadata to the LD session) and getObservabilitySessionURL for retrieving the active session replay URL.

nodes.name: matchLogToAttributes.ts
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the canon.match OTel span wire schema. Shared by both browser and server adapters. Applies all canon.*, stage.N.*, and arbitration.* attributes to a SpanLike object from a MatchLogEntry, including score scaling (×100, 2dp), LD 2000-char attribute truncation, and conditional fields. References domain's summarizeMatchLog for the human-readable trace summary.

nodes.name: matchLogParity.test.ts
nodes.summary: Parity tests asserting that applyMatchLogAttrs emits identical span attributes on browser (fast) and server (cf) paths (modulo canon.path), verifies specific field values, score scaling (×100 with 2dp), conditional canon.normalized omission, and LD 2000-char truncation for arbitration prompt/response.

nodes.name: sessionControl.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for session control and init module. Covers manualStart option passing to SessionReplay constructor, startObservabilitySession with and without name (LDRecord.start, addSessionProperties), stopObservabilitySession, and isObservabilitySessionActive state checks. Uses vi.mock for LaunchDarkly SDK modules.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json (ld-observability)
nodes.summary: TypeScript project configuration for the ld-observability adapter. Extends base config, targets ES2022+DOM lib, enables composite mode for project references, and references domain and shared-types packages.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo (ld-observability)
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache artifact for the ld-observability package. Auto-generated by tsc composite builds; not human-authored.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts (ld-observability)
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for the ld-observability adapter. Minimal config naming the test suite @salt/ld-observability and targeting all test files under the tests directory.

nodes.name: package.json (@salt/domain)
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the pure domain layer. Declares dual subpath exports (default index and ./schemas), depends only on @salt/shared-types and zod. Enforces domain purity — no Firebase, no browser APIs, no I/O dependencies.

nodes.name: ErrorReportingPort.ts
nodes.summary: Domain port interface for error reporting. Defines the ErrorReportingPort interface with a single report(error: unknown) method, following the hexagonal architecture pattern of defining ports in the domain layer.

nodes.name: no-firebase.ts (boundary test)
nodes.summary: Intentional boundary violation fixture for ESLint enforcement testing. Attempts to import 'firebase/firestore' from domain, which must trigger a no-restricted-imports ESLint error. Used by boundary:test CI check to verify domain cannot import Firebase.

nodes.name: no-indexeddb.ts (boundary test)
nodes.summary: Intentional boundary violation fixture for ESLint enforcement testing. Attempts to import 'idb' from domain, which must trigger a no-restricted-imports ESLint error. Verifies domain cannot import browser storage packages.

nodes.name: no-web-pwa.ts (boundary test)
nodes.summary: Intentional boundary violation fixture for ESLint enforcement testing. Attempts to import '@salt/web-pwa' from domain, which must trigger a no-restricted-imports ESLint error. Verifies that no package may import the web-pwa app.

nodes.name: no-cross-module-subpath.ts (boundary test)
nodes.summary: Intentional boundary violation fixture for ESLint enforcement testing. Attempts to import a sibling module's internal entity (canon/entities/CanonItem) directly from the auth module, bypassing the published index. Must trigger a no-restricted-imports ESLint error.

nodes.name: User.ts
nodes.summary: Domain entity for an authenticated user identity. Defines the User interface with uid and nullable email. Intentionally excludes workspace role (handled by a separate membership module). Represents the auth boundary: answers 'who is signed in?' only.

nodes.name: index.ts (auth module)
nodes.summary: Published surface for the domain auth module. Re-exports User type and AuthProvider port type. The only file other domain modules and coordinators are permitted to import from the auth module, enforcing module boundary isolation.

nodes.name: AuthProvider
nodes.summary: Port interface defining the authentication provider contract for the domain layer, bridging User entities and shared-types.

nodes.name: no-coordinator boundary test
nodes.summary: Boundary test fixture asserting that canon module must not import from domain coordinators (enforces hexagonal module isolation).

nodes.name: no-cross-module-subpath boundary test
nodes.summary: Boundary test fixture asserting that canon module must not import from recipe module subpaths (enforces cross-module isolation).

nodes.name: appendCanonSynonym
nodes.summary: Domain command that appends a new synonym to an existing CanonItem, normalising the name before storage.

nodes.name: approveCanonItem
nodes.summary: Domain command that transitions a CanonItem from pending/needs-approval state to approved, returning a Result type.

nodes.name: buildMatchLog
nodes.summary: Domain command that constructs a MatchLogEntry from match data, capturing the rationale and confidence for each canon item match decision.

nodes.name: createAisle
nodes.summary: Domain command that creates a single Aisle entity, using an IdGenerator port and persisting via AisleLocalStorePort.

nodes.name: createAislesBulk
nodes.summary: Domain command for bulk creation of Aisle entities, using IdGenerator and AisleLocalStorePort for batch persistence.

nodes.name: createCanonItem
nodes.summary: Domain command that creates a new CanonItem entity with a generated ID, returning a Result type from shared-types.

nodes.name: deleteAisles
nodes.summary: Domain command that deletes one or more Aisles, reassigning any canon items they contained via CanonLocalStorePort.

nodes.name: matchOrCreate
nodes.summary: Core domain command orchestrating the canon matching pipeline: embedding similarity, string/token matching, AI arbitration, and item creation or synonym appending. The most complex file in the canon module.

nodes.name: mergeAisles
nodes.summary: Domain command that merges two or more Aisles into one, updating canon item references via AisleLocalStorePort and CanonLocalStorePort.

nodes.name: mergeCanonItems
nodes.summary: Domain command that merges two CanonItem entities, combining synonyms and preserving canonical name.

nodes.name: renameAisle
nodes.summary: Domain command that renames an Aisle entity, returning a Result and persisting via AisleLocalStorePort.

nodes.name: renameCanonItem
nodes.summary: Domain command that renames a CanonItem, returning a Result from shared-types.

nodes.name: reorderAisles
nodes.summary: Domain command that reorders Aisles by updating sort indices, persisting via AisleLocalStorePort.

nodes.name: resolveCanonConflict
nodes.summary: Domain command that resolves a conflict between two CanonItems by delegating to mergeCanonItems.

nodes.name: setCanonItemAisle
nodes.summary: Domain command that assigns a CanonItem to a specific Aisle, returning a Result.

nodes.name: setCanonItemShoppingFields
nodes.summary: Domain command that sets shopping-specific fields (e.g. default unit) on a CanonItem.

nodes.name: setCanonItemSynonyms
nodes.summary: Domain command that replaces the full synonym list on a CanonItem.

nodes.name: Aisle entity
nodes.summary: Core domain entity type definition for Aisle (grocery store aisle/category). Minimal type with no dependencies.

nodes.name: AislesDocument entity
nodes.summary: Domain entity representing the Firestore document that stores the ordered list of Aisle entities.

nodes.name: CanonItem entity
nodes.summary: Core domain entity for a canonical grocery item, holding name, synonyms, aisle assignment, approval status, and shopping fields. Depends on shared-types for Result/DomainError.

nodes.name: MatchCandidate entity
nodes.summary: Domain entity representing a candidate CanonItem returned during matching, with a similarity score.

nodes.name: MatchLogEntry entity
nodes.summary: Domain entity capturing a full match log entry: input, matched item, decision rationale, confidence score, and outcome. No external dependencies.

nodes.name: canon/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the canon domain module, re-exporting all commands, entities, ports, and queries.

nodes.name: AisleLocalStorePort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for local storage of aisle data in the canon domain.

nodes.name: CanonArbitrationPort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for AI-driven canon arbitration, defining the contract for resolving canon item conflicts.

nodes.name: CanonLocalStorePort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for local storage of canon items in the canon domain.

nodes.name: CanonLookupPort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for canon item lookup, providing search and retrieval operations.

nodes.name: EmbeddingPort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for text embedding generation, used for semantic canon matching.

nodes.name: IdGenerator.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for generating unique IDs within the canon domain.

nodes.name: MatchLoggingPort.ts
nodes.summary: Port interface for logging canon match decisions and results.

nodes.name: createCanonLookup.ts
nodes.summary: Factory query that builds a canon lookup from the local store, enabling efficient item retrieval.

nodes.name: embedMatch.ts
nodes.summary: Query that performs semantic embedding-based matching of input names against canon items.

nodes.name: findClosestMatch.ts
nodes.summary: Core canon matching query that orchestrates string similarity, token, synonym, and embedding strategies to find the closest canon item.

nodes.name: getAisleUsage.ts
nodes.summary: Query that computes how many canon items are assigned to each aisle.

nodes.name: listAisles.ts
nodes.summary: Query that retrieves and returns the ordered list of aisles from the local store.

nodes.name: matchThresholds.ts
nodes.summary: Constants and configuration for canon match confidence thresholds.

nodes.name: normaliseName.ts
nodes.summary: Pure utility that normalises raw input names for consistent canon matching (lowercasing, trimming, etc.).

nodes.name: stringSimilarity.ts
nodes.summary: Pure utility computing string similarity scores (e.g., Levenshtein/Jaro-Winkler) for canon matching.

nodes.name: summarizeMatchLog.ts
nodes.summary: Query that summarises a match log into a human-readable or structured format for review.

nodes.name: synonymMatch.ts
nodes.summary: Query that checks whether an input name matches any known synonyms of a canon item.

nodes.name: tokenMatch.ts
nodes.summary: Pure utility that computes token-based overlap scores between item names for canon matching.

nodes.name: no-cross-module-subpath.ts
nodes.summary: Boundary test fixture asserting that equipment module cannot import from canon module subpaths.

nodes.name: addAccessory.ts
nodes.summary: Command that adds an accessory to an existing equipment manifest item.

nodes.name: addEquipment.ts
nodes.summary: Command that creates and adds a new equipment item to the equipment manifest.

nodes.name: addRule.ts
nodes.summary: Command that adds a usage rule to an equipment item in the manifest.

nodes.name: editRule.ts
nodes.summary: Command that updates an existing rule on an equipment item in the manifest.

nodes.name: removeAccessory.ts
nodes.summary: Command that removes an accessory from an equipment item in the manifest.

nodes.name: removeEquipment
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that removes an equipment item from an EquipmentManifest by ID. Returns NotFound failure if the item does not exist, otherwise returns a new manifest with the item filtered out.

nodes.name: removeRule
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that removes a rule from an equipment item by index. Validates equipment existence and rule index bounds; returns a new manifest with the rule removed and updatedAt stamped.

nodes.name: renameEquipment
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that renames an equipment item. Validates that the trimmed name is non-empty and the item exists, then returns an updated manifest with the new name and updatedAt.

nodes.name: setAccessoryOwned
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that toggles the owned flag on an equipment accessory. Validates equipment and accessory existence, then returns an updated manifest with the accessory's owned field set and updatedAt stamped.

nodes.name: EquipmentItem
nodes.summary: Defines the EquipmentItem and Accessory TypeScript interfaces representing a single piece of kitchen equipment with its accessories and rules. Schema version pinned at 1.

nodes.name: EquipmentManifest
nodes.summary: Defines the EquipmentManifest interface, the wire shape of the equipmentManifest/current Firestore document. Contains a versioned list of EquipmentItem objects with a top-level updatedAt timestamp.

nodes.name: equipment/index
nodes.summary: Published surface barrel for the equipment domain module. Re-exports all entity types, port interfaces, and command functions (add/remove/rename equipment, accessories, rules). Enforces module encapsulation — only items exported here are accessible externally.

nodes.name: EquipmentManifestPort
nodes.summary: Defines the EquipmentManifestPort interface: a hexagonal architecture port for loading and saving the EquipmentManifest from/to storage. Returns Result types; implementations live in firebase-sync.

nodes.name: IdGenerator (equipment)
nodes.summary: Defines the IdGenerator port interface for the equipment module, providing newEquipmentId() and newAccessoryId() factory methods. Implementations inject ID generation strategies without coupling domain to Firebase.

nodes.name: domain/index
nodes.summary: Root barrel for @salt/domain. Aggregates and re-exports the full public API of all domain modules: canon (items, aisles, matching), auth (User), equipment (items, commands), shopping list (items, commands, grouping, parsing), and the cross-cutting ErrorReportingPort.

nodes.name: aislesDocument schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for the aisles Firestore document. Defines AisleSchema (id, name, order) and AislesDocumentSchema (schemaVersion 1, updatedAt, aisles array). Derives AisleDoc and AislesDocumentDoc types via z.infer.

nodes.name: canonArbitration schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for canon-matching AI arbitration. Defines ArbitrationRequestSchema (input to the canon-matching Genkit flow) and CanonArbitrationAIOutputSchema (flat shape from Gemini model output including match_found, canonical_name, aisle, shoppingBehavior, unit).

nodes.name: canonItem schema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for the canon item Firestore document. Defines CanonItemSchema at schemaVersion 5 with fields: name, synonyms, aisleId, embedding, needs_approval, shoppingBehavior, unit, and reasoning. Derives CanonItemDoc via z.infer.

nodes.name: embedTextInput schema
nodes.summary: Minimal Zod schema for the embed-text callable Cloud Function input: a single text string field. Derives EmbedTextInput type via z.infer.

nodes.name: equipmentManifest schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for the equipment Firestore document. Defines AccessorySchema, EquipmentItemSchema (with defaulted accessories and rules arrays), and EquipmentManifestSchema. Defaults allow partial Firestore docs to normalise instead of failing validation.

nodes.name: identifyEquipment schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for the identifyEquipment Genkit AI flow. Defines EquipmentCandidateSchema (name + rationale), IdentifyEquipmentAIOutputSchema (candidates array from Gemini), and IdentifyEquipmentInputSchema (rawName string input).

nodes.name: schemas/index
nodes.summary: Barrel for the @salt/domain/schemas subpath entrypoint. Re-exports all Zod schemas and inferred types from every schema module: canon arbitration, canon item, aisles, equipment manifest, shopping list, shopping list item, config, parseEntry AI output, populateEquipmentEntry, matchOrCreateCanon, and embedTextInput.

nodes.name: matchOrCreateCanonInput schema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for the matchOrCreate callable Cloud Function input: rawName string, optional selectedAisleId, and optional forceCreate flag. Derives MatchOrCreateCanonInput type via z.infer.

nodes.name: parseEntry schema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for the parseEntry Genkit AI flow output. Defines ParseEntryAIOutputSchema with name, context, and optional amount (number) and unit (string) fields extracted by Gemini from raw shopping-list entry text.

nodes.name: populateEquipmentEntry schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for the populateEquipmentEntry Genkit AI flow. Defines EquipmentAccessorySchema, PopulateEquipmentEntryAIOutputSchema (name + accessories array from Gemini), and PopulateEquipmentEntryInputSchema (confirmedName string input).

nodes.name: shoppingList schema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for the shopping list Firestore document. Defines ShoppingListSchema with defaulted id, name, schemaVersion (1), createdAt, and updatedAt fields. Derives ShoppingListDoc via z.infer.

nodes.name: shoppingListItem schema
nodes.summary: Zod schemas for the shopping list item Firestore document. Defines discriminated-union SourceRefSchema (manual | recipe) and ShoppingListItemSchema with amount/unit optional fields for the amount-unit feature. Uses .catch('pending') for matchState resilience.

nodes.name: shoppingListsConfig schema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for the shopping lists configuration Firestore document. Defines ShoppingListsConfigSchema with defaultListId and schemaVersion (1) with defaults. Derives ShoppingListsConfigDoc via z.infer.

nodes.name: no-cross-module-subpath boundary test
nodes.summary: Intentional boundary violation fixture: imports a canon module internal directly via subpath (../../canon/entities/CanonItem) from the shoppingList module. Used by the boundary-test suite to assert that eslint-plugin-boundaries raises an error for this import pattern.

nodes.name: addItem
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that adds a new item to a shopping list. Validates non-empty rawText, constructs a new ShoppingListItem (pending match state, no canonId), and returns the appended list. Accepts a source reference (manual or recipe) and an IdGenerator port.

nodes.name: checkItem
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that marks a shopping list item as checked. Finds the item by id, returns NotFound failure if absent, otherwise maps over the list returning the item with checked=true and an updated timestamp.

nodes.name: clearCheckedItems
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that removes all checked items from a shopping list by filtering them out. Returns a success result with the remaining unchecked items.

nodes.name: createList
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that creates a new ShoppingList entity. Validates that the name is non-empty, generates a new list id via IdGenerator, and returns a fully constructed ShoppingList value.

nodes.name: deleteItem
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that removes a single shopping list item by id. Returns NotFound failure if the item does not exist, otherwise filters the item out of the list.

nodes.name: deleteList
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that removes a shopping list. Guards against deleting the default list (returns LIST_IS_DEFAULT error) and against deleting a non-existent list (NotFound). Returns the filtered list of remaining shopping lists.

nodes.name: editItemNotes
