nodes.summary: Pure domain command that updates the notes field of a shopping list item. Finds the item by id (NotFound on miss), trims the notes string, and returns the updated item list.

nodes.name: editItemRawText
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that changes the raw text of a shopping list item and resets its canon match state to pending. Validates non-empty rawText, finds item by id, and returns updated list.

nodes.name: moveItems
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that moves a set of items from a source list to a target list. Validates all item ids exist in the source, resets canonId and matchState to pending on moved items, and returns both updated lists.

nodes.name: renameList
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that renames a shopping list. Validates the new name is non-empty, confirms the list exists (NotFound on miss), and returns the updated list collection.

nodes.name: setDefaultList
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that updates the default list id in ShoppingListsConfig. Verifies the target list exists (NotFound on miss) and returns the updated config.

nodes.name: uncheckItem
nodes.summary: Pure domain command that marks a shopping list item as unchecked. Mirror of checkItem — finds item by id, returns NotFound on miss, maps over list setting checked=false.

nodes.name: ShoppingList
nodes.summary: Defines the ShoppingList entity interface: id, name, schemaVersion (literal 1), createdAt and updatedAt ISO-8601 timestamps. Pure type — no logic.

nodes.name: ShoppingListItem
nodes.summary: Defines the ShoppingListItem entity and MatchState union type. Fields include rawText, notes, sources (SourceRef[]), canonId, matchState, optional amount/unit for structured quantities, checked flag, schemaVersion, and timestamps.

nodes.name: ShoppingListsConfig
nodes.summary: Defines the ShoppingListsConfig entity: defaultListId string and schemaVersion literal 1. Minimal config document tracking which list is the default.

nodes.name: SourceRef
nodes.summary: Discriminated union type for item provenance: 'manual' (no extra fields) or 'recipe' (recipeId, servings, optional label). Tracks how a shopping list item was created.

nodes.name: shoppingList index
nodes.summary: Public API barrel for the shoppingList domain module. Re-exports all entities, ports, commands, and queries. Enforces module encapsulation — only items exported here are accessible to other domain modules and adapters.

nodes.name: EntryParsePort
nodes.summary: Port interface for AI-fallback structured entry parsing. Defines a single parse(rawText) async method returning ReadResult<ParsedEntry, DomainError>. Designated extension point for amount/unit parsing via AI adapters.

nodes.name: IdGenerator
nodes.summary: Port interface for ID generation in the shopping list module. Provides newListId() and newItemId() methods, keeping ID generation out of pure domain logic.

nodes.name: ShoppingListItemPort
nodes.summary: Port interface for shopping list item persistence: listItems, saveItem, deleteItem, deleteItems, and moveItems. All methods are async returning ReadResult.

nodes.name: ShoppingListPort
nodes.summary: Port interface for shopping list persistence: listLists, createList, renameList, and deleteList. All methods are async returning ReadResult.

nodes.name: ShoppingListsConfigPort
nodes.summary: Port interface for shopping lists config persistence: load() returning the config or null, and save(config). Used to read/write the default list configuration.

nodes.name: combineItemsByUnit
nodes.summary: Pure query that groups shopping list items by their unit (case-insensitive), summing amounts within each group into a UnitSlot. Used for display-time quantity combination without mutating stored data.

nodes.name: groupItemsByAisle
nodes.summary: Pure query that organises shopping list items into a GroupedShoppingList: aisle groups (sorted by aisle order, then canon name), an 'other' bucket for unmatched/pending items, and a checked bucket sorted by most-recently-checked first.

nodes.name: parseShoppingListEntry
nodes.summary: Pure parser that extracts structured fields from a raw shopping list entry string. Handles leading quantity (amount + optional unit via attached or space-separated patterns), trailing 'for' context splitting, and safety fallbacks. Returns ParsedEntry with name, context, optional amount and unit.

nodes.name: MatchLogBuilder.test
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for the MatchLogBuilder class from @salt/domain. Covers: correct rawInput/normalizedInput capture, id and finalDecision propagation, stage ordering, schemaVersion=2, valid ISO8601 timestamp, reset behaviour on second start(), stages snapshot isolation, inputItemCount default/set/reset, totalDurationMs non-negative, and arbitration log set/default/reset.

nodes.name: aislesDocument.schema.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type-level and runtime tests for the AislesDocument schema, verifying schemaVersion literal, updatedAt string type, readonly Aisle array, and valid document construction.

nodes.name: approveCanonItem.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the approveCanonItem command, covering needs_approval flag, field preservation, shoppingBehavior overrides, largeQuantityThreshold overrides, and combinations thereof.

nodes.name: canonItem.schema.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type-level and runtime tests confirming CanonItem schemaVersion is literal 5 and that createCanonItem sets the correct schemaVersion and empty updatedAt sentinel.

nodes.name: clientFastPathParity.integration.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test verifying parity between the client fast-path (findClosestMatch + appendCanonSynonym) and the CF matchOrCreate pipeline for clear stage 1-4 matches. Guards against future drift between client and server code paths.

nodes.name: createAisle.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the createAisle command covering order assignment, whitespace trimming, blank name validation, case-insensitive duplicate detection, and store failure propagation.

nodes.name: createAislesBulk.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the createAislesBulk command covering ordered append, case-insensitive deduplication, blank name filtering, and validation/storage error propagation.

nodes.name: createCanonItem.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for createCanonItem covering valid creation, IdGenerator usage, synonym trimming, aisleId preservation, blank name validation, shoppingBehavior defaults and overrides, and largeQuantityThreshold handling.

nodes.name: createCanonLookup.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the createCanonLookup query, verifying single-load caching, synchronous findClosestMatch, normaliseName exposure, refresh capability, and store failure propagation.

nodes.name: deleteAisles.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the deleteAisles command verifying aisle removal, cascading aisleId=null and needs_approval=true on affected CanonItems, and store failure propagation.

nodes.name: embedMatch.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the embedMatch query covering null-embedding skipping, threshold filtering using MATCH_THRESHOLDS.stage5Stop, candidate shape (stage=5, confidence=cosine score), descending sort, embedding failure handling, and empty catalog.

nodes.name: findClosestMatch.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the 4-stage findClosestMatch query covering exact name, token overlap, synonym, and string similarity stages, including ambiguity detection and no-match cases.

nodes.name: getAisleUsage.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the getAisleUsage query verifying per-aisle CanonItem counts, null/unknown aisleId exclusion, and store failure propagation.

nodes.name: listAisles.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the listAisles query covering sort-by-order, empty store, null store return, and store load failure propagation.

nodes.name: matchOrCreate.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive unit tests for the matchOrCreate command covering all match stages, create path, arbitration, embedding fallback, logging, store interactions, and error scenarios. Largest test file in the canon suite.

nodes.name: mergeAisles.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the mergeAisles command covering move/unassign item choices, default unassign behavior, source aisle deletion, untouched-item preservation, and canon store list failure propagation.

nodes.name: mergeCanonItems.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the mergeCanonItems LWW merge function covering id preservation, remote-wins fields (name, aisleId, thumbnail, embedding), synonym union with deduplication, and needs_approval OR semantics.

nodes.name: normaliseName.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the normaliseName utility covering lowercasing, diacritic stripping, hyphen conversion, punctuation removal, whitespace collapsing, singularization rules, leading quantity stripping, and empty/blank input handling.

nodes.name: ports.contract.test.ts
nodes.summary: Type-level contract tests using expectTypeOf to verify CanonLocalStorePort and AisleLocalStorePort method signatures are exactly as specified.

nodes.name: renameAisle.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the renameAisle command covering successful rename, whitespace trimming, blank name validation, NotFound error, case-insensitive duplicate detection, same-name no-op, and store failure propagation.

nodes.name: renameCanonItem.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the renameCanonItem command covering successful rename with trim, field preservation, and ValidationError for blank or empty names.

nodes.name: reorderAisles.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the reorderAisles command covering order reassignment by index, unknown id skipping, appending missing aisles in original relative order, and store load failure propagation.

nodes.name: resolveCanonConflict.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for resolveCanonConflict covering keep-local, keep-remote identity returns, and merge field-precedence rules with object reference checks.

nodes.name: setCanonItemAisle.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for setCanonItemAisle covering aisle assignment, replacement, null clearing, and field preservation.

nodes.name: setCanonItemShoppingFields.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for setCanonItemShoppingBehavior and setCanonItemThreshold commands, covering behavior updates, threshold and unit set/remove combinations, and field preservation.

nodes.name: setCanonItemSynonyms.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for setCanonItemSynonyms covering synonym assignment, trimming, empty string removal, deduplication, clearing, and field preservation.

nodes.name: stringSimilarity.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for the stringSimilarity utility. Verifies Levenshtein-distance-based scoring: identical strings return 1, completely different strings return 0, single-char typos score above the stage-4 stop threshold (0.85), and the function is symmetric.

nodes.name: summarizeMatchLog.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Vitest suite for the summarizeMatchLog domain function. Uses factory helpers (makeStage, makeEntry, makeArbitration) to build ArbitrationLog, MatchLogEntry, and StageLog fixtures, then asserts the structured summary output for various match decision paths.

nodes.name: synonymMatch.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for the synonymMatch canon query. Exercises case-insensitive synonym lookup against a fixture CanonItem array, covering matching, non-matching, empty list, and empty-target edge cases.

nodes.name: tokenMatch.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for the tokenMatch canon query. Verifies token-overlap scoring: identical strings return 1, disjoint tokens return 0, partial overlaps return proportional scores, the function is symmetric, and the stop-threshold boundary is respected.

nodes.name: commands.test.ts
nodes.summary: Large Vitest suite for all equipment domain commands: addEquipment, removeEquipment, renameEquipment, addAccessory, removeAccessory, setAccessoryOwned, addRule, removeRule, and editRule. Uses factory helpers and an EquipmentManifest fixture to cover happy-path and error cases with ErrorCode validation.

nodes.name: combineItemsByUnit.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest tests for combineItemsByUnit, the display-time aggregation function that sums shopping list item amounts sharing the same unit. Covers same-unit summation, no-amount fallback, mixed units, and items with no amount/unit.

nodes.name: commands.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Vitest suite for all shopping list domain commands: createList, renameList, deleteList, setDefaultList, addItem, editItemRawText, editItemNotes, checkItem, uncheckItem, deleteItem, clearCheckedItems, and moveItems. Tests use ShoppingListIdGenerator fixtures and cover happy-path and ErrorCode validation cases.

nodes.name: groupItemsByAisle.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest tests for the groupItemsByAisle domain query. Exercises grouping of ShoppingListItem objects by their associated aisle via a CanonInfo map, including items with no canon match, aisle ordering, and uncategorised fallback groups.

nodes.name: parseEntry.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest tests for parseShoppingListEntry, verifying extraction of name, context, amount, and unit from free-text shopping list entries. Covers 'for' phrase splitting, plain entries, word-boundary rules, and amount/unit parsing (e.g., '2 kg apples').

nodes.name: smoke.test.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal smoke test confirming @salt/domain is importable and that it can import from the allowed @salt/shared-types layer. Serves as a fast architectural health check.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project configuration for @salt/domain. Extends the repo base tsconfig, sets composite mode for project references, and references @salt/shared-types as the sole allowed upstream package.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache for @salt/domain. Auto-generated by tsc; tracks file hashes and output state to enable fast incremental compilation.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for @salt/domain. Names the test suite '@salt/domain' and targets all test files under the tests/ directory.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @salt/shared-types. Declares it as an ESM-only private workspace package with a single export entry point (./src/index.ts) and a vitest run script. Has no internal @salt/* dependencies, enforcing the bottom-of-stack rule.

nodes.name: no-domain.ts
nodes.summary: Deliberate boundary-violation fixture: imports @salt/domain to assert that eslint-plugin-boundaries produces an error. Used by the .boundary-tests/run.sh harness to enforce the rule that @salt/shared-types must not import from @salt/domain.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Root export of @salt/shared-types. Defines the cross-boundary error contract (Success, Failure, Conflict, ReadResult, WriteResult, Result), the closed DomainError union, shared DTOs (CanonItemDTO, AisleDTO, AisleListDTO), the ErrorCode const enum, and ShoppingBehavior/CanonItemUnit types. This is the bottom-of-stack layer; it imports nothing from @salt/*.

nodes.name: smoke.test.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal smoke test confirming @salt/shared-types is importable. Serves as a fast build-health check for the bottom-of-stack package.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project configuration for @salt/shared-types. Extends the repo base tsconfig with composite mode. Has no project references, reflecting its position as the dependency-free bottom layer.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache for @salt/shared-types. Auto-generated; tracks compiled output state for fast incremental builds.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for @salt/shared-types. Names the suite '@salt/shared-types' and targets all test files under tests/.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @salt/testing-utils. ESM-only private workspace package that depends on @salt/domain and @salt/shared-types. Provides shared test helpers (makeId, makeTimestamp) across the monorepo.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for @salt/testing-utils. Exports two lightweight test helpers: makeId (random base-36 string) and makeTimestamp (current Date). These utilities are consumed across domain and adapter test suites.

nodes.name: smoke.test.ts
nodes.summary: Smoke tests for @salt/testing-utils. Verifies the package can import @salt/shared-types (layer compliance), and that makeId returns a non-empty string and makeTimestamp returns a Date instance.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project configuration for @salt/testing-utils. Extends the repo base tsconfig with composite mode and references @salt/shared-types, @salt/domain, and @salt/firebase-sync, reflecting its position as a cross-layer test utility package.

nodes.name: tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
nodes.summary: TypeScript incremental build cache for @salt/testing-utils. Auto-generated; tracks compiled output state for fast incremental builds.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts

Handles WSL2 edge cases where emulator subprocesses survive hub teardown. Exits 0 when all configured ports are free, exits 1 if any remain occupied.

layers.name: Shared Types
layers.description: Cross-boundary type contracts shared across layers. Contains pure TypeScript types and interfaces with no runtime logic.

layers.name: Domain
layers.description: Pure business logic with no side effects, I/O, or framework dependencies. Contains commands, queries, entities, ports (interfaces), and conflict resolution policy.

layers.name: Firebase Adapter
layers.description: Firebase SDK usage and Firestore live data layer. The only place firebase or firebase-admin may be imported. Adapts domain ports to Firestore persistence.

layers.name: LaunchDarkly Observability Adapter
layers.description: LaunchDarkly observability adapter with browser (default) and server subpaths. Ships OpenTelemetry spans and feature flags. Must not be cross-imported with firebase-sync.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: Reusable headless and styled UI component library built on shadcn/tailwind. The only layer that may import shadcn-svelte, bits-ui, or melt-ui.

layers.name: Testing Utilities
layers.description: Shared test utilities and helpers used across packages. May import domain, shared-types, firebase-sync, and ld-observability.

layers.name: Web PWA
layers.description: SvelteKit Progressive Web App — the user-facing application. Imports from domain, firebase-sync, ld-observability (browser), and ui-components.

layers.name: Cloud Functions
layers.description: Firebase Cloud Functions and Genkit AI flows. Imports from domain and ld-observability/server. All Gemini/AI access goes through Genkit flows here.

layers.name: Kitchen Sink
layers.description: Component demonstration and development app for testing UI components in isolation.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Docker, CI/CD, build scripts, root configuration files, Firebase config, ESLint config, workspace manifests, and other infrastructure concerns.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Architecture documentation, design specs, Claude AI commands, VS Code settings, and other non-code documentation files.

layers.name: Boundary Tests
layers.description: Deliberate architecture violation fixtures used by CI enforcement to verify that ESLint boundary rules correctly reject illegal imports.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start here to understand what Salt 2.0 is: a family grocery and shopping list PWA built on Firebase. The README gives the high-level pitch, while CLAUDE.md is the machine-enforced architecture contract that every agent and developer must follow. Reading both together gives you the full mental model before touching any code.

tour.title: Architecture Contract & Enforcement
tour.description: The hexagonal architecture is not just a convention — it is enforced by ESLint boundary rules and a CI pipeline that blocks bad PRs. The eslint.config.js defines the import-graph constraints (e.g. domain must stay pure, Firebase SDK only in firebase-sync). The CI workflow runs lint, typecheck, and boundary tests on every push. Understanding these guards explains why the layer structure is so strictly maintained.

tour.title: Cross-Boundary Contracts — Shared Types
tour.description: Before diving into any layer, understand the lingua franca that all layers use to communicate results. shared-types defines Success, Failure, DomainError, and related discriminated-union contracts. These types flow from the domain outward through adapters to the app without ever leaking implementation details. Every adapter return type is expressed in these terms.

tour.title: Domain Layer — Pure Business Logic
tour.description: The domain package is the heart of Salt 2.0. It contains entities, commands, and queries with zero I/O dependencies — no Firebase, no browser APIs, no Node built-ins. The barrel export in index.ts shows everything the domain makes public. ShoppingListItem is the core entity for the shopping list feature, and addItem is a representative command showing how mutations are expressed as pure functions.

tour.title: Domain Queries — Amount/Unit Parsing
tour.description: parseEntry.ts is a domain-layer query that extracts structured amount and unit information from free-text shopping list entries (e.g. '2 cups flour' → { amount: 2, unit: 'cups', name: 'flour' }). It demonstrates the query pattern in the domain: a pure function that takes raw input and returns a typed result without side effects. This parser feeds into the display-time combination logic on the shopping list UI.

tour.title: Canon Matching Pipeline — AI-Powered Item Normalization
tour.description: The canon matching pipeline is the most architecturally significant feature. matchOrCreate.ts in the domain layer defines the pure policy: given a raw shopping entry, either find an existing canonical grocery item or signal that one should be created. This is where the business rules live, separate from the Gemini/Genkit AI calls that happen in Cloud Functions. Reading this file before the CF flows clarifies the separation of concerns.

tour.title: Cloud Functions & Genkit AI Flows
tour.description: Cloud Functions host all AI calls via Genkit to keep Gemini API keys off the client. index.ts is the CF entry point that registers all callable functions. matchOrCreateCanon.ts is the Genkit flow wired to the domain matchOrCreate policy — it orchestrates the vector search and callable boundary. arbitrateCanon.ts is the Gemini-backed arbitration step that resolves naming conflicts when multiple raw inputs map to the same canonical item.

tour.title: Firebase Adapter — Real-Time Firestore Sync
tour.description: The firebase-sync adapter is the only place in the entire codebase that may import the Firebase SDK. init.ts sets up the Firestore client with persistentLocalCache for offline support. shoppingListItems.ts shows the subscription pattern: a real-time Firestore listener that maps Firestore documents through Zod validation to domain entities, skipping corrupt docs rather than failing the whole stream.

tour.title: UI Component Library
tour.description: ui-components is a headless + styled Svelte component library built on shadcn-svelte. The public API barrel in index.ts shows what primitives are available to the web-pwa. The web-pwa must always import UI primitives through this package — direct imports of shadcn-svelte, bits-ui, or melt-ui from the app are forbidden by the boundary rules.

tour.title: Web PWA — SvelteKit Application
tour.description: The web-pwa is the user-facing SvelteKit app. App.svelte is the root component that wires up auth, Firestore sync, and routing. shoppingListService.ts is the service layer bridge that connects the SvelteKit UI to the firebase-sync adapter and the domain layer — it is the dependency-injection seam where the adapter implementations are bound to the domain ports. This is a key pattern to understand when adding new features.

tour.title: Shopping List Feature — End to End
tour.description: With all layers in view, trace the shopping list feature from UI to storage. ShoppingListPage.svelte is the main shopping UI — it calls shoppingListService.ts, which calls the firebase-sync adapter, which reads/writes Firestore documents validated against the ShoppingListItem schema. On add, the entry goes through parseEntry (domain query) for amount/unit extraction, then the matchOrCreate flow (CF + Genkit + Gemini) normalizes it to a canon item. This stop ties every previous stop together into one coherent data flow.
